subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast served the Kingdom of God! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast been attracted by the sweet fragrances of God; glad tidings be unto thee, inasmuch as thou hast been set ablaze with the fire of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من خدم ملکوت الله طوبی لک بما انجذبت بنفحات الله بشری لک بما اشتعلت بنار محبه الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
